documentation.description:
Common pre-instantiated format functions for convenience
This package provides ready-to-use format functions for the most
common type combinations, eliminating the need for manual instantiation.

subprograms.name: Format_IS
subprograms.code:
function Format_IS
  (Template : String; Arg1 : Integer; Arg2 : String) return String

subprograms.name: Format_ISI
subprograms.code:
function Format_ISI
  (Template : String; Arg1 : Integer; Arg2 : String; Arg3 : Integer)
   return String

subprograms.name: Format_ISIF
Format_S
subprograms.code: function Format_S (Template : String; Arg : String) return String

subprograms.name: Format_SI
subprograms.code:
function Format_SI
  (Template : String; Arg1 : String; Arg2 : Integer) return String

subprograms.name: Format_SII
subprograms.code:
function Format_SII
  (Template : String; Arg1 : String; Arg2, Arg3 : Integer) return String

subprograms.name: Format_SISIB
Format_SSI
subprograms.code:
function Format_SSI
  (Template : String; Arg1, Arg2 : String; Arg3 : Integer) return String

subprograms.name: Format_SSII
subprograms.code:
function Format_SSII
  (Template : String; Arg1, Arg2 : String; Arg3, Arg4 : Integer)
   return String

generic_instantiations.name: Format_B
generic_instantiations.code: function Format_B is new Format (Boolean, Formatters.Boolean_Formatter);

generic_instantiations.name: Format_F
generic_instantiations.code: function Format_F is new Format (Float, Float_Formatter);

generic_instantiations.name: Format_FI
generic_instantiations.code:
function Format_FI is new
  Format_2 (Float, Integer, Float_Formatter, Integer_Formatter);

generic_instantiations.name: Format_I
generic_instantiations.code: function Format_I is new Format (Integer, Integer_Formatter);

generic_instantiations.name: Format_IF
generic_instantiations.code:
function Format_IF is new
  Format_2 (Integer, Float, Integer_Formatter, Float_Formatter);

generic_instantiations.name: Format_II
generic_instantiations.code:
function Format_II is new
  Format_2 (Integer, Integer, Integer_Formatter, Integer_Formatter);

generic_instantiations.name: Format_IIF
generic_instantiations.code:
function Format_IIF is new
  Format_3
    (Integer,
     Integer,
     Float,
     Integer_Formatter,
     Integer_Formatter,
     Float_Formatter);
